combined_text: Advantages of Embryo Transfer for Both Mare and Owner Submitted by Flossie Sellers on Mon, 02/07/2011 - 1:21pm Embryo transfer is an assisted reproduction technique by which an embryo is transferred from a donor mare to the uterus of a recipient mare that will carry the pregnancy to term.
